title: Reassignment
code:
x = 5
x = x + 2
x = x * 3

print(x)

title: Loop Boundary
code:
total = 0

for i in range(4):
    total += i

print(total)

title: Function Return
code:
def double(n):
    return n * 2

result = double(4)
print(result)

title: The Greeting
code:
def greet(name):
    message = "Hello, " + name

result = greet("Maya")
print(result)

title: Two Variables
code:
a = 3
b = a
a = 8

print(a)
print(b)

title: Shared List
code:
a = [1, 2]
b = a
b.append(3)

print(a)
print(b)

title: Going Independent
code:
a = [1, 2]
b = a[:]
b.append(3)

print(a)
print(b)

title: Equality vs Identity
code:
a = [1, 2]
b = [1, 2]
c = a

print(a == b)
print(a is b)
print(a is c)

title: List Comprehension
code:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4]
doubled = [n * 2 for n in nums]

print(doubled)

title: Filtering with a Comprehension
code:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
evens = [n for n in nums if n % 2 == 0]

print(len(evens))
print(evens)
